languages.text: "Неужели... Пред нами {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}, {mf|тот|та}, что по старым легендам по воле самого Императора появится в самый черный день, дабы спасти детей Его грешных?" {n}Несмелый юношеский голос дрожит из-под маски.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Неужели... Пред нами {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}, {mf|тот|та}, что по старым легендам по воле самого Императора появится в самый черный день, дабы спасти детей Его грешных?" {n}Несмелый юношеский голос дрожит из-под маски.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Неужели... Пред нами {mf|Небесный Посланник|Небесная Посланница}, {mf|тот|та}, что по старым легендам по воле самого Императора появится в самый черный день, дабы спасти детей Его грешных?" {n}Несмелый юношеский голос дрожит из-под маски.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His sinful children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His sinful children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

traits.locale_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}
traits.speaker: SurvivorLeaderBoy

languages.text: "Ist es... Ist es der himmlische Gesandte selbst, der, wie in den Legenden vorausgesagt, dem Willen des Kaisers am dunkelsten Tag folgen würde, um seine missratenen Kinder zu retten?" {n}Die Stimme des jungen Mannes unter der Maske ist sanftmütig und zittrig zugleich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}

languages.text: "Est-ce... Est-ce l'Envoyé céleste lui-même, celui qui viendrait, comme l'annonçaient les légendes, suivre la volonté de l'Empereur en ce jour sombre pour sauver ses enfants égarés ?" {n}La voix du jeune homme sous le masque est à la fois douce et hésitante.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}

languages.text: "是......是天国使者本人吗？ 他就像传说中的那样 在最黑暗的一天遵照皇帝的旨意前来拯救他的孩子们？"{n}面具下年轻人的声音既温顺又颤抖。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}

languages.text: "¿Es... ¿Es el mismísimo Enviado Celestial, el que vendría como predijeron las leyendas, siguiendo la voluntad del Emperador en el día más oscuro para rescatar a Sus hijos descarriados?". {n}La voz del joven bajo la máscara es a la vez mansa y temblorosa.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}

languages.text: 「それは...天の使いが、伝説にあるように、暗い日に皇帝の意志を継いでやって来て、皇帝の道を踏み外した子供たちを救い出すのだろうか？"{n}仮面の下の青年の声は、おとなしく、震えている。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}

languages.text: "Bu... Efsanelerde anlatıldığı gibi, İmparator'un en karanlık gününde O'nun asi çocuklarını kurtarmak için gelen Cennet Elçisi'nin ta kendisi mi?" {n}Genç adamın maskenin altındaki sesi hem uysal hem de titrek.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Is it... Is it the Heavenly Envoy {mf|himself|herself}, {mf|he|she} who would come as the legends foretold, following the Emperor's will on darkest day to rescue His wayward children?" {n}The young man's voice under the mask is both meek and quavering.{/n}
